meta.description: BONK — high-volume legitimate distributed trading. Many unique senders, no single wallet with >=3 round-trips within 25 slots. Signal A and B should not fire.

pool.note: Representative Raydium BONK/SOL pool; exact pool address may differ from live state

trading_pattern_summary.note: BONK's distributed retail trading produces many unique wallets each transacting once or twice; no systematic round-trip pattern from any individual address
trading_pattern_summary.typical_block_gap_between_same_wallet_sw: thousands of slots — far exceeds 25-slot window
trading_pattern_summary.cluster_net_flow_check: With 12,400 distinct senders and top-50 by volume all being DEX arbitrage bots and Jupiter router addresses (filtered as known-aggregator), Signal B cluster detection finds no group with net flows summing to zero

expected_result.reason: is_established_protocol=true (jup_strict=true); Signal A suppressed. Signal B: no cluster with min 3 wallets and net zero flows in top-50. No anomaly detected.
